key_takeaways: Razorpay focus: payments, reliability, idempotency, ACID guarantees
Payment-specific: idempotency keys, saga pattern, outbox pattern, reconciliation
Reliability: 99.99% uptime = 52 min downtime/year. Circuit breakers, graceful degradation
Compliance: PCI DSS concepts (no need to know in depth, but aware), audit logging
Round structure: 2-3 coding + 1 system design + 1 behavioral (Razorpay values customer impact stories)
Interview style: problem-first, then discuss scaling and edge cases
